title: elaeagnus montana var. montana
intro: Elaeagnus montana var. montana, also known as silverberry, is a deciduous shrub native to North America, characterized by its silvery-gray leaves and small, fragrant flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory activities, derived from its leaves and berries. The health benefits of Elaeagnus montana var. montana include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are traditionally used to treat various ailments, including colds, fever, and digestive issues.
